title: Bound an untrusted compressed net payload
prompt:
In server-side Garry's Mod Lua, receive MyAddon.Upload from an admin. The message payload contains only LZMA data. Accept at most 32 KiB compressed and 256 KiB decompressed, then call consume(decoded). Reject invalid decompression. Show the complete receiver and pool its constant network string once at load time.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: early net.Receive bit-length bound, bounded net.ReadData, util.Decompress maxSize, nil check, and load-time network pooling
